title: Confounder-adjusted survival curves
description: Use ONLY when the user explicitly requests survival curves or visualization of time-to-event outcomes, such as Kaplan–Meier curves or adjusted survival curves. This method estimates confounder-adjusted survival curves using IPTW and produces curve outputs over time. It does NOT estimate a single causal effect such as ATE. Do NOT use this tool for causal effect estimation, even if the outcome is survival or time-to-event.
